title: salix × algovica
intro: Salix × algovica is a hybrid willow tree, resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × algovica include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat conditions like arthritis, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues.
